required_fixes: In src/components/membership/WhoItsFor.astro, replace visible internal labels Dreamers, Entrants, Professionals, and Leaders with vault-approved everyday public wording, or record an explicit vault decision approving those public labels.
In src/components/membership/HowRecognitionWorks.astro, add vault-sourced plain-language hint text or tooltips for Member, Active Member, Ambassador, and Leadership Circle.
Confirm the returning-member claim-profile wording in the vault before rendering it as final copy, or remove that block until it is confirmed. There is no membership staging allowance for it.
Replace the membership meta and social descriptions with exact vault copy, or add the metadata wording to the vault.
summary: FAIL: the main factual page copy is sourced, and the brand locks hold. The page still publishes internal/plain-language-sensitive labels without required explanations and renders unconfirmed returning-member copy with no membership staging allowance.
